description: Indigenous street gang based in Winnipeg, Manitoba, Canada, founded in 1988 by the Wolfe brothers. One of the largest street gangs in Canada, involved in drug trafficking, auto theft, firearms, and other crimes. Designated as indigenous-based organized crime by Criminal Intelligence Service Canada. Still active.

country_links.evidence_quote: "Angus" purchased cheap stereo systems from China to smuggle drugs via air planes to the northern reserves.
country_links.context: The Indian Posse purchased cheap stereo systems from China to smuggle drugs via airplanes to northern reserves.

country_links.evidence_quote: In 1994, the Indian Posse had made contracts with criminal elements in reservations in North Dakota and South Dakota in an attempt to set up a cross-border smuggling network.
country_links.context: The Indian Posse made contracts with criminal elements in reservations in North Dakota and South Dakota to set up a cross-border smuggling network.
